appearance.hair: Purple long hair with pink highlights
appearance.eyes: Purple with faint starlight, prominent dark circles
appearance.clothing: Oversized dark gray jacket, mini skirt, black stockings, worn shoes.
appearance.weapon: None. Relies on 灵力回路-gathered intelligence to avoid danger.

char_description.overview: Sleepless 齿轮 intelligence broker sheltering seven orphans, trading secrets to sustain a makeshift family.
char_description.combat_style: Avoids combat. Uses 回顾 and 前瞻 to detect threats early. Helpless if cornered.

char_personality.strengths: Unmatched investigative persistence. Genuine kindness earns fierce loyalty from sheltered children.
char_personality.flaws: Helpless in combat. Exhaustion dulls judgment. 灵力回路 useless without clues to anchor on.
char_personality.quirks: Dozes off mid-conversation from 灵力回路 overuse. Collects trinkets from investigation sites.

char_background.origin: Awakened at 16 in Nagasaki with a 灵力回路 flooding her with trace perception. Bedridden for weeks. Began taking in street children.
char_background.current_mission: Sustains a hidden orphanage, juggling multiple investigations.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Excellent, substantial 灵力 to handle high-intensity use and multiple simultaneous 灵力回路.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Excellent, exceptionally acute perception with sensitivity to malicious 灵力 that causes burning pain on contact.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-故事集: Anchors onto a trace/object, unlocking tiers by clues. 回顾: traces trajectory. 前瞻: 30s first-person view. 后日谈: full chronological replay. Cannot skip tiers.

char_relationships.Sheltered children: Seven children. The only ones who see her unguarded warmth.

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 被问及为何收留那些孩子
char_dialogue_examples.response: 她往暖炉里添炭的手停了一瞬，眼眸没有从炉火上移开，"因为他们睁开眼的时候，世界已经不需要他们了。和我一样。"说完继续拨弄炭火。

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 向委托人解释调查进展
char_dialogue_examples.response: 她从口袋摸出烟蒂排在桌上。"回顾跑完了，你的合伙人每周四晚上绕路经过这仓库。"她点了点烟蒂，"前瞻，三十秒。他藏的不是账簿，是住院记录。"揉着太阳穴，"后日谈还差一条线索，凑齐了给你完整时间线。"
她看着对方砸在桌上的拳头，眼皮都没抬。撕下一页推过去，"你上周二晚上十一点在三号码头做的事，我已经看过了。"她抬眼，"你有时间在这里和我吹胡子瞪眼，不如想想怎么跟你的老板交代吧。"
